calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar May-19-2026 Continued To Jul-21-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amanda Ebey appeared via zoom for Ahmad Mohazab (executor).

Ms. Ebey stated that she is waiting on her client to get back to her about tax information, and that there is a Life insurance policy and Annuities.

The Court stated that she needs to request for a new probate referee due to the retirement of Ms. Yaowitz, that she should file a petition to approve status report under sec 12200, and that all beneficiaries are to be informed of the current status.

The Court also suggested filing the Final Inventory and Appraisal two weeks before the next hearing.

The matter is continued to Jul 21, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Bloom. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jan-27-2026 Continued To May-19-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amanda Ebey appeared via zoom for Ahmad Mohazab (petitioner).

Ms. Ebey stated that There is a cash account that is not named in the trust , that there possibly three annuities for this estate, and that she will file a request for a probate referee in this matter. The matter is continued to May 19, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge:Cindee Mayfield. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Musto. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-10-2025 Continued To Jan-27-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-12-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amanda Ebey for Petitioner Ahmad Mohazab.

The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated September 15, 2015 is admitted to probate. Ahmad Mohazab is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Shirley Yawitz is appointed the probate referee. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for December 10, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-22-2024 Continued To Nov-12-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Ebey appeared by zoom for petitioner.

Mrs. Ebey stated that the special administrator went to the bank with certified copies of the order and the letters and that the bank is requesting a certified copy of the death certificate for the predeceased brother. The court instructed Mrs. Ebey to file a verified statement regarding their search for the original will by November 8, 2024. The Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to November 12, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Colhour. Not reported.
